title: BannerForLabyMod
description: Display a custom banner over the tab, simple and easy (LabyMod 4 required)
body:
# BannerForLabyMod
Display a custom banner over the tab, simple and easy (LabyMod 4 required).


<details>
<summary>ATTENTION</summary>

The LabyMod API plugin is required for BannerForLabyMod to work, download it together with BannerForLabyMod [here](https://github.com/LabyMod/labymod4-server-api/releases/download/1.0.5/labymod-server-api-bukkit-1.0.5.jar). The download should start immediately.

(If you are NOT using PaperMC/Spigot/Bukkit this plugin will not work. Unfortunately, this plugin is **not compatible** with velocity or bungeecord. Support for proxies is planned for the future)

In addition **the aspect ratio of the image must be 5:1** and the recommended resolution is 1280x256 pixels. If you scale the image higher, always keep the ratio 5:1!

</details>



### Preview
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d77f8fd2a66ab6b51f2cc3e4be0f2a8930d21ebe_0.webp)

### How it works
Every player who uses the client LabyMod 4 will see a banner above the TabList. It's as simple as it sounds. LabyMod is a German Survival/PvP client with over 4 million unique users. Try it out! Go to [LabyMod's Website](https://www.labymod.net/en)
### Features
- High-resolution banners up to 5K
- Easy handling
- Simple config
- No impact on performance

### Permissons
No permission is required for the players. All players using the client LabyMod 4 will see the banner.

### Bug report & support
If you need help or have a bug please contact me via discord (add hassanbwo). I will guarantee quick help - Thanks for supporting :)

### config.yml
Simple config. Just change the link to your own personalized banner link (make sure it is a direct link).
```
# ==========================================
# BannerForLabyMod – config.yml
# ==========================================
# Here you can change the url of the banner:
# Make sure you use a direct link, where only the picture is opened!
# ==========================================
# When you create a banner:
# Please note the aspect ratio of the image must be 5:1 and the recommended resolution is 1280x256 pixels!
# ==========================================

banner_url: "https://i.ibb.co/7rBhrfn/example.png"
```
